description:
You are a landscaping company supervisor who needs to register a new materials supplier in Vtiger CRM so that purchase orders can be created for upcoming spring projects. Create a new Vendor record with the following details:

- Vendor Name: GreenScape Materials Co.
- Phone: 512-555-8734
- Email: orders@greenscapematerials.com
- Website: www.greenscapematerials.com
- Street: 4200 Industrial Parkway
- City: Austin
- State: Texas
- Postal Code: 78745
- Country: United States
- Description: Primary supplier for landscaping materials including mulch, stone, and irrigation supplies. Net 30 payment terms.
